Tests the behavior of the Math.atan2 function with negative zero and positive zero inputs.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when `Math.atan2` is called with arguments `-0` and `+0`, the result is `-0`. This test ensures that the function correctly handles edge cases involving signed zeroes, which is important for mathematical accuracy in computations. The code is a single assertion and provides narrow functionality focused on validating a specific mathematical operation.
